evals.prompt: How should I structure my new Node.js application following Clean Architecture?
My use case is importing the Express Request type. Is this a problem?

evals.description: Triggers on business logic isolation question
evals.prompt: How do I separate my business logic from the database in a clean way?

evals.description: Can define a use case with proper ports
evals.prompt: Write a use case for user registration following Clean Architecture

evals.description: Can cross a boundary with dependency inversion
evals.prompt: My use case needs to save to a database. Show me how to do this without the use case knowing about PostgreSQL.

evals.description: Can structure a project with domain-screaming folders
evals.prompt: Reorganize my project that has controllers/, models/, services/ folders to follow Clean Architecture

evals.description: Can design a controller as an interface adapter
evals.prompt: Write an Express controller for creating orders that follows Clean Architecture
I'm building a simple TODO app with 3 endpoints. Should I use full Clean Architecture with all 4 layers?

evals.description: Identifies framework coupling as a violation
evals.prompt: Is it okay to use @Entity decorators from TypeORM directly on my domain entities?

evals.description: Does not invent non-existent Clean Architecture concepts
evals.prompt: What does Clean Architecture say about the Service Mesh Integration Layer?

evals.description: Does not confuse Clean Architecture with microservices
Can explain component principles when asked
evals.prompt: Explain the Acyclic Dependencies Principle and how to break dependency cycles between packages

evals.description: Does not trigger for CI/CD pipeline questions
evals.prompt: How should I set up my GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for deploying to AWS?
